pairs.visible_evidence: Faucet is visible and identifiable near the center of both images, mounted on the sink basin.

pairs.visible_evidence: Faucet is visible near the sink rim in both images; converted view is clearly identifiable and original view is visible but blends into red material.

pairs.visible_evidence: Cup-like objects are near the center on the tabletop or tray; converted view shows small white circular cup tops more clearly.

pairs.visible_evidence: Cup is visible and centered in both images from the same apparent camera/view; shape and open top make it identifiable.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Converted image has a major material/color change that is useful diagnostically but risky for visual-preservation claims; retake after material/color preservation fixes or use a closer crop.

pairs.visible_evidence: The same stemmed cup or glass is visible on a tabletop in both images from the same camera.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Strong material/color differences and a visible wire/grid background weaken a fair before/after visual claim; retake larger and with better target separation.

pairs.visible_evidence: A tiny rectangular or clock-like object appears on the far tiled wall, but clock features are not readable and converted view is less distinguishable.

pairs.visible_evidence: Both images show a small bottle or vase-like object near the center against the back wall, with comparable camera/view.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Object is small and could be confused with a vase; converted image is darker and lower contrast. Retake closer with cleaner bottle angle.

pairs.visible_evidence: The same small cup or glass-like object is visible near the rear tabletop edge, with rim/stem/base and straw.

pairs.visible_evidence: The bottle-shaped object is centered and fully visible in both images with comparable camera/view.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Strong material/color shift weakens visual-fidelity claims; retake only if the pair is needed as clean final evidence.

pairs.visible_evidence: Faucet is visible near the sink in both images, with upright body and angled spout identifiable.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Original view has weak faucet contrast against red/glossy sink material and A/B exposure differs strongly; retake closer or more centered.

pairs.visible_evidence: The centered stemmed cup/glass is visible and identifiable on the tabletop in both images.

pairs.visible_evidence: A round wall clock is visible on the central wall or partition in both images, with radial hands or markers identifiable.

pairs.visible_evidence: The same small bottle-shaped object is visible near the center/back counter area in both images, with matched viewpoint.

pairs.visible_evidence: The same centered stemmed cup/goblet is visible on a tabletop in both images from the same camera.

pairs.visible_evidence: A round wall clock-like object with hands is visible on the central pillar in both images.

pairs.visible_evidence: The same small stemmed cup/glass is visible near center in both images, with straw/rim details visible.
